prompt: A vast luminous network of interconnected nodes rendered as softly glowing orbs connected by delicate threads of light, photographed from an intimate close perspective. Every node visible in the foreground appears dim and peripheral compared to the brighter, denser clusters just beyond it. No matter where the eye rests, the centre of gravity seems to lie one step further away. Deep black background. The structure is simultaneously dense and isolating. Photorealistic, cinematic lighting, ultra-high detail. No text. No labels. No human figures.
visual_logic: A node network where every visible node sits in shadow relative to its neighbours' brightness. The eye can never find a centre — each point feels peripheral, embodying the paradox that everyone has fewer connections than their friends.
